purpose: Portable generation spec for Roots & Rise readings. Feed this whole object to the model.

constructions: contrast constructions of the form 'it is X, it's Y' / 'not X but Y'

tones.grounded: steady, rooted, quiet strength; affirms who the reader already is
tones.rising: forward motion, empowerment, momentum; calls the reader upward
tones.mixed: blend of grounded and rising in one breath

reading_structure.name: combined_reading
reading_structure.source: AI blend of western+animal traits anchored by combo seed, woven with element flavor_clause; fallback = template from traits + seed

reading_structure.name: quote
reading_structure.source: AI-generated in style-bank voice; fallback = a kept style bank line for this combo or tone

reading_structure.name: validation_line
reading_structure.source: AI-generated, short enough for wallpaper/mug/card; fallback = shortest kept style bank line matching tone

few_shot_examples: style_exemplars.json: 57 exemplars balanced across tones; 14 anti-examples with reasons
anti_patterns: Too abstract: vague noun-stacking with no concrete image (e.g. "Joy informs your transformative presence")
Contrast constructions: "not X but Y" / "isn't X, it's Y" forms
Tacked-on aphorism endings that restate the point (user note on "Freedom is how you breathe.")
Em dashes and en dashes anywhere
Banned words: actually, lands, looks like

generation_pipeline.thread: One idea both signs feed: a shared value, image, or productive tension. The spine of everything.
generation_pipeline.line: The purest, shortest expression of the thread. Under 8 words. Mug and wallpaper ready.
generation_pipeline.reading: Descriptive register: 2-3 concrete sentences per sign about how the person moves through the world, 1 sentence of element coloring, then a short simple bow that names the thread. No abstract musing or poetic openers; specificity first, click at the end.
generation_pipeline.quote: 1-2 sentences on the same thread, in the exemplar voice.
generation_pipeline.section_regenerate_rule: Regenerating one section keeps the thread locked so all parts stay connected. Only a full regenerate may find a new thread.
generation_pipeline.element_role: Supporting voice behind the Western+animal pair. Accentuates and contextualizes, never leads.
generation_pipeline.kinship_rule: If the combo has archetype_kinship, lean into the shared animal as the thread candidate.
